System 2035 · v1.0
00 North Star 01 Visual System 02 Color System 03 Typography 04 Grid & Space 05 Art Direction 06 Page Structure 07 Storytelling Flow 08 UX Concept 09 Motion Behavior 10 Transitions 11 Futuristic UI 12 Hero Scenes 13 WebGL Ideas 14 Components 15 Interactions 16 Frontend Build 17 Motion Refs 18 Roadmap
CALM · INTELLIGENT · ALIVE
Designed as an installation
Creative Direction · Cinematic Futuristic Portfolio

A digital installation,
not a portfolio.

This document is the operating system for Mostafa Amir's portfolio — a complete creative direction covering visual language, motion behavior, UX, WebGL, and frontend architecture. The goal is not to present work; it is to make a visitor feel they stepped into an interface from the future, guided by a calm, precise intelligence.

دي مش وثيقة شكليّة. دي نظام تشغيل كامل للموقع: هوية بصرية، حركة، تجربة استخدام، ومعمارية تقنية — كل قسم مصمَّم إن أي حد يدخل يحس إنه دخل تجربة من المستقبل، مقادة بذكاء هادئ ودقيق. الأولوية للإحساس والأجواء، مش لكثافة المعلومات.

MoodCalm intelligence · Digital luxury StackNext.js · GSAP · Three.js · Lenis BenchmarkApple · Google Lab · BMW · Awwwards Year2026 → built for 2035
00

North Star & Principles

المبدأ الموجِّه: الهدوء كميزة تنافسية. كل قرار تصميمي لازم يخدم إحساس واحد — ذكاء هادئ، فخامة رقمية، وغموض محسوب. لو عنصر مبيخدمش الإحساس ده، يتشال.

Every decision is measured against one feeling: a calm, intelligent system you can sense but never see working. Five operating principles govern the build:

  • Atmosphere over information. Density is the enemy. White space, darkness, and silence are active design materials.
  • Motion is meaning. Nothing moves for decoration — motion communicates hierarchy, causality, and state.
  • Systems, not screens. Identity, product, and automation share one continuous language across every surface.
  • Human-guided, AI-accelerated. The work feels handcrafted at the surface, intelligent underneath.
  • Performance is a feature. 60fps and fast first paint are non-negotiable; cinematic ≠ slow.
// emotional target
feeling = "you entered a system, not a website"
avoid = ["agency template", "startup landing", "card grid", "hype"]
protect = ["silence", "depth", "taste", "restraint"]
01

Visual System

النظام البصري قايم على الظلام + العمق + الضوء الحجمي. الخلفية مش سوداء فلات — دي فضاء فيه طبقات، إضاءة، وضباب ناعم. الزجاج (glassmorphism) بيتستخدم للطبقات اللي "بتطفو" فوق الفضاء ده.

The visual system is built on four layers that always stack in the same order, creating consistent depth:

Layer 0 — Void

The Space

Near-black background with volumetric gradients and drifting light. This is the "room" everything floats in.

Layer 1 — Signal

WebGL / Particles

The living 3D field: particle nebula, morphing geometry, shader light. Reacts to cursor and scroll.

Layer 2 — Glass

Floating UI

Translucent panels, HUD cards, terminals — frosted, edge-lit, slightly elevated with soft shadow.

Layer 3 — Type

Kinetic Typography

Massive display type as the primary visual. Always the brightest, sharpest layer.

Texture & finish: a subtle film grain overlay (4–5% opacity, overlay blend) unifies everything and kills banding in gradients. A vignette focuses attention toward the center. Edges of glass panels carry a 1px gradient stroke (the "edge-light").

02

Color System

لوحة الألوان: أساس داكن عميق + تدرجات بنفسجي/ماجنتا/أزرق كهربائي. الألوان الزاهية تُستخدم كـضوء مش كمساحات — دايمًا في gradients، إضاءة، أو نص. القاعدة: 90% ظلام وحياد، 10% طيف لوني.

The 90/10 rule: 90% dark neutrals, 10% spectrum. Saturated color appears as light (gradients, glows, type fills) — never as flat fills. Click any swatch to copy its value.

Core tokens

Void#050409
Surface#0A0814
Ink#ECECF7
Muted#8786A6
Faint#46446A
Purple#7C3AED
Violet#A855F7
Magenta#E11D8F
Electric Blue#3B82F6
Cyan#22D3EE

Signature gradients

AURORA — primary. Headlines, CTAs, progress. linear-gradient(90deg,#A855F7,#E11D8F,#22D3EE)
NEBULA — ambient light / orbs. radial-gradient(circle,#7C3AED,#E11D8F,transparent)
SIGNAL — accents, links, system states. linear-gradient(90deg,#3B82F6,#22D3EE)

Usage rules do / don't

  • Do use gradients on text via background-clip:text for hero and section heads.
  • Do keep body copy in Muted; reserve Ink for emphasis and headlines.
  • Don't fill large surfaces with saturated color — it breaks the "luxury" register instantly.
  • Don't exceed 2 spectrum colors in one viewport unless inside a WebGL scene.
03

Typography System

التايبوغرافي هو البطل البصري. حجم ضخم، وزن مدروس، وtracking سالب للعناوين الكبيرة. الـ mono بيدي إحساس "نظام/واجهة تقنية". في الإنتاج، الأفضل خطوط زي Clash Display أو PP Neue Montreal، وهنا بنستخدم بدائل من Google Fonts.

RoleFont (here)Production altUse
DisplaySpace GroteskClash Display / PP Neue MontrealHero, section heads, project titles
BodyInterSöhne / Suisse Int'lParagraphs, sub-copy
MonoJetBrains MonoSpace Mono / Berkeley MonoLabels, eyebrows, system UI, terminal
ArabicNoto Sans ArabicIBM Plex Arabic / TheYearofHandicraftsSignature lines, bilingual accents

Type scale & specimen

MostafaDisplay XL · clamp(3.2→15rem) · ‑0.04em · 0.88lh
Story experiencesHead · clamp(1.7→3rem) · ‑0.03em
Calm on the surface, engineered underneath.Body · 1.05rem · 300 · 1.6lh
SYSTEM · 01 — IDENTITYMono · 0.72rem · 0.3em tracking · uppercase
  • Negative tracking scales with size — the bigger the type, the tighter (down to ‑0.04em).
  • Line-height collapses on display (0.85–0.92) and opens on body (1.6–1.7).
  • Mono uppercase + wide tracking is the "system voice" — eyebrows, coordinates, status.
  • Bilingual: Arabic appears as deliberate signature moments, never as a full mirror of the English.
04

Grid & Spatial System

مفيش شبكة كلاسيكية متماثلة. الإحساس spatial — عناصر بتطفو في فراغ بأعماق مختلفة. بس تحت السطح فيه نظام صارم: 12-column، إيقاع مسافات ثابت، وحواف تتنفّس.

The layout feels free and spatial, but rests on a strict 12-column grid with a consistent spacing rhythm. Asymmetry is intentional and composed, never accidental.

TokenValueUse
Columns12 · gutter clamp(16px,2vw,32px)Master grid
Max width1440px content · full-bleed scenesReading vs. immersive
Section paddingclamp(5rem,12vh,11rem) verticalCinematic breathing room
Spacing scale4 · 8 · 16 · 24 · 40 · 64 · 104pxVertical rhythm
Depth layers (z)bg · scene · glass · type · cursorConsistent stacking

Composition tactics: break the grid deliberately with oversized type that bleeds off-canvas, off-axis project rows, and floating glass panels that overlap section boundaries to create depth.

05

Art Direction Notes

الإخراج الفني: سينمائي، داكن، حجمي. تخيّل واجهة نظام تشغيل من فيلم sci-fi راقي — لكن من غير cliché النيون الزاعق. كل لقطة فيها مصدر ضوء واحد مهيمن، عمق، وحركة بطيئة محسوبة.

Lighting

One dominant source

Each section has a single key light (a glow, an orb) that defines depth and mood. Light moves slowly with scroll.

Texture

Grain + glass

Film grain unifies; frosted glass elevates. No flat surfaces, no hard pure-black.

Tempo

Slow & deliberate

Everything eases in over 0.8–1.4s. Nothing snaps. The pace signals confidence.

Restraint

Earn every effect

Effects are rationed. One hero moment per section. Silence between beats.

Do / Don't

  • Do let scenes breathe with negative space and darkness.
  • Do treat the cursor, scroll, and loader as part of the art direction.
  • Don't use stocky 3D, lens flares, or "techy" HUD clutter — it reads cheap.
  • Don't animate everything at once; choreograph one focal motion at a time.
06

Page Structure

سبع محطات، كل واحدة "مشهد" مستقل بإيقاع وإضاءة مختلفة — لكن متصلين كرحلة واحدة.

#SectionRoleSignature moment
01Hero — Cinematic IntroFirst impression / aweWebGL core + name forming from particles
02Interactive IdentityWho he isStatement + hover-reactive role list + marquee
03Selected WorkProof, as storyFull-bleed case rows that expand on hover
04Experimental AI LabEdge / R&DLive "system thinking" terminal + glass cards
05Systems ShowcaseHow he thinksAnimated node map (Strategy→Growth)
06PhilosophyValues / depthLine-by-line scroll reveal of beliefs
07Contact ExperienceInvitationCommand-line invite + magnetic CTA
07

Immersive Storytelling Flow

الموقع رحلة عاطفية ليها قوس درامي: دهشة → فهم → إثبات → فضول → ثقة → دعوة. الـ WebGL والإضاءة بيتطوروا مع التمرير عشان يدعموا القوس ده.

The scroll is a narrative arc, not a list of sections. The WebGL scene and lighting evolve continuously with scroll progress to carry the emotion:

ActSectionEmotionScene state
I — ArrivalHeroAwe, mysteryCore tight, particles dense, cool light
II — RecognitionIdentityTrust, clarityCamera pulls back, palette warms
III — EvidenceWorkRespectScene recedes, type dominates
IV — WonderLabCuriosityParticles energize, magenta peak
V — UnderstandingSystems / PhilosophyConvictionScene calms, structure emerges
VI — InvitationContactDesire to actCore expands, light blooms outward
08

UX Concept

المبدأ: الانغماس من غير ما الناس تتوه. حرية في الإحساس، وضوح في الملاحة. مفيش قوائم تقيلة — الموقع بيقود العين بالحركة والضوء.

  • Guided immersion: scroll is the primary interaction; the system always signals where attention should go.
  • Minimal persistent nav: a floating glass HUD with section coordinates, not a heavy menu bar.
  • Always-available exit ramps: a fixed scroll-progress "system status" and quick-jump links.
  • Progressive disclosure: case studies expand in place; detail is revealed on intent (hover/click), never dumped.
  • Feedback on everything: cursor, hover, and click all confirm the system heard you.
  • Graceful fallbacks: reduced-motion and no-WebGL paths preserve the story without the heavy GPU work.
09

Motion & Animation Behavior

الحركة ليها قواعد فيزيائية ثابتة: easing موحّد، توقيتات محددة، و lerp ناعم لأي حاجة بتتبع الماوس أو التمرير. ده اللي بيخلي الإحساس "premium" مش عشوائي.

Easing tokens

--ease-out-expo : cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) // reveals, transitions
--ease-in-out   : cubic-bezier(0.83, 0, 0.17, 1) // loader, page swaps
gsap           : power4.out / power3.out      // staggered text
lerp factor    : 0.08 – 0.12              // cursor, parallax, scene follow

Timing table

InteractionDurationEasingNotes
Micro (hover)200–350msease-outColor, scale, underline
Text reveal800–1200mspower4.outStagger 18–40ms per unit
Section reveal1000–1400msease-out-expoClip + translate + fade
Page / route transition1000–1600msease-in-outCurtain or scene morph
Parallax / scrubtied to scrolllinear + lerpNever snappy
Loader2000–2400msease-in-outCounter + name type-in

Behavior rules

  • Stagger reveals so the eye reads in sequence; never reveal a whole block at once.
  • Velocity-aware: marquees and skew respond to scroll velocity for a physical feel.
  • Lerp, don't jump: anything tracking input is smoothed toward its target every frame.
10

Cinematic Transitions

الانتقالات هي "اللحظات السينمائية". الأهم: الـ loader → hero، والانتقال بين الأقسام، والدخول على الـ case study.

Boot

Loader → Hero

Counter to 100%, name types in, then a vertical curtain wipe reveals the scene as the hero text staggers up.

Scene morph

Section → Section

No hard cuts. The WebGL scene continuously interpolates color, camera, and density driven by scroll progress.

Case enter

Row → Case study

Clicked project title performs a FLIP — it scales and travels to become the case-study header (shared element).

Route swap

Page transitions

An overlay panel slides up with the destination label, content cross-fades behind it, then it lifts away.

// shared-element / FLIP pattern (Framer Motion)
layoutId="project-aurum" // on row title AND case header
transition={{ duration: 1.1, ease: [0.16,1,0.3,1] }}
11

Futuristic UI Behaviors

تفاصيل الواجهة هي اللي بتبيع إحساس "النظام". مؤشر مخصص، أزرار مغناطيسية، واجهات زجاجية طايفة، وحالة نظام حيّة.

Cursor

Reactive cursor

Dot + lerped ring, difference blend. Grows and changes on interactive elements; can show contextual labels ("view", "drag").

Magnetism

Magnetic targets

CTAs and nav items pull toward the cursor within a radius, snapping back with spring on exit.

HUD

Floating glass nav

Frosted, edge-lit, with a live status dot ("AVAILABLE — 2026") and section coordinates.

Status

System telemetry

Scroll progress framed as a "system" bar; section labels read like coordinates / log lines.

Type

Text scramble

Labels decode on hover/enter (random glyphs settling into the word) for a computational feel.

Audio

Sound-reactive (subtle)

Optional muted ambient pad + soft UI ticks; particle brightness can pulse to amplitude. Off by default, one-tap on.

12

Hero Scene Concepts

تلات اتجاهات للـ hero — كلها WebGL، وكلها تدّي إحساس "core/نواة ذكية". الأول هو المعتمد في الـ demo.

Concept A · shipped

The Core

A morphing wireframe icosahedron (noise-displaced) inside a particle nebula. Slow rotation, cursor parallax, scroll-driven color & dolly. Reads as a calm intelligence at rest.

Concept B

Signal Field

A GPGPU flow-field of thousands of particles that drift, react to the cursor, and momentarily resolve into "MOSTAFA AMIR" before dissolving back into motion.

Concept C

Spatial Grid

An infinite perspective grid with volumetric fog and floating glyphs — a BMW-style spatial environment you appear to be moving through as you scroll.

13

WebGL / Three.js Scene Ideas

الـ WebGL هو روح الموقع. الفكرة مش "نموذج 3D" — الفكرة أنظمة جسيمات وشيدرز بتتنفّس وتتفاعل. كله مبني على الأداء.

  • Particle nebula: 5–8k instanced points, custom shader, additive blending, gentle sine drift + cursor force.
  • Noise-displaced morph: icosahedron displaced along normals by simplex/curl noise in the vertex shader.
  • Flow field (FBO/GPGPU): positions advected by a curl-noise field for organic, fluid motion.
  • Text-to-particles: sample the name into points; lerp between "formed" and "scattered" states on scroll.
  • Volumetric light / fog: raymarched soft fog or layered sprites for depth and god-rays.
  • Post-processing: selective bloom, subtle chromatic aberration, vignette, and shader film grain via postprocessing.
  • Shader gradient backdrop: a full-screen fragment shader animating the aurora palette behind everything.
// vertex — noise displacement (concept)
float d = curlNoise(position * 1.1 + uTime * 0.2) * uAmp;
vec3 p = position + normal * d;
gl_Position = projectionMatrix * modelViewMatrix * vec4(p, 1.0);

Performance budget non-negotiable

  • DPR cap at 2; pause rendering when canvas off-screen (IntersectionObserver).
  • Mobile: ~40% particle count, bloom off, antialias off, sensor parallax optional.
  • Instancing for particles; avoid per-frame allocations; reuse geometries/materials.
  • Target 60fps; degrade gracefully to a CSS gradient hero if WebGL is unavailable.
14

Component Concepts

مكتبة مكوّنات قابلة لإعادة الاستخدام — كل واحد بسلوك حركي مدمج فيه.

<CursorSystem/>

Cursor + magnetism

Global custom cursor, hover states, and data-cursor / data-magnetic bindings.

<Scene/>

WebGL canvas

R3F canvas with the core + particles; exposes scroll/cursor uniforms; lazy-mounted.

<KineticHeading/>

Split-text reveal

Splits to chars/words, reveals on scroll with stagger; gradient-fill variant.

<ProjectStory/>

Expanding case row

Full-bleed row → in-place expand → shared-element to case page.

<GlassPanel/>

HUD / card surface

Frosted, edge-lit container with cursor-follow glow; base for lab cards & nav.

<SystemMap/>

Animated node graph

SVG nodes + flowing dashed links; hover highlights a phase.

<Terminal/>

Live log

Types "system thinking" lines on enter; the AI-lab centerpiece.

<Marquee/>

Velocity ribbon

Infinite scroll text that skews/accelerates with scroll velocity.

<Loader/>

Boot sequence

Counter + name type-in + curtain reveal; gates the hero intro.

<SmoothScroll/>

Lenis provider

Wraps the app; syncs with GSAP ScrollTrigger and scene uniforms.

15

Interaction Ideas

الـ micro-interactions هي اللي بتفرق بين "موقع حلو" و"تجربة بتتفكر". مجموعة مختارة:

  • Layered hover on project rows — title shifts & gradient-fills, meta + description unfold, "enter" arrow slides in.
  • Cursor-follow glow inside glass cards (radial light tracks the pointer).
  • Text scramble/decode on labels and nav as they enter or on hover.
  • Scroll-velocity skew on the marquee and large imagery for a physical, weighty feel.
  • Magnetic CTA with spring-back; ripple on click.
  • Drag-to-explore in the AI Lab (cards or a mini scene respond to drag inertia).
  • Hold-to-reveal easter touches (press a glyph to expose a hidden detail).
  • Command-line contact — typed invitation with blinking caret instead of a plain form.
16

Advanced Frontend Implementation

المعمارية: Next.js (App Router) + TypeScript، وطبقة حركة من ثلاث أدوات بتشتغل سوا — Framer Motion للمكوّنات والانتقالات، GSAP ScrollTrigger للتمرير، Lenis للنعومة، و React Three Fiber للـ WebGL.

LayerTechResponsibility
FrameworkNext.js (App Router) + TSRouting, RSC, image/font optimization
StylingTailwind + CSS vars (tokens)Design system as variables
Component motionFramer MotionLayout, shared-element, route transitions
Scroll choreographyGSAP + ScrollTriggerPinning, scrubs, reveals, timelines
Smooth scrollLenisInertia; drives ScrollTrigger + scene
3DReact Three Fiber + drei + postprocessingScene graph, helpers, post FX
ShadersGLSL (glslify)Particles, morph, gradient, fog

Architecture & performance

  • Single source of truth for scroll: Lenis → ScrollTrigger.update → scene uniforms. One value drives everything.
  • Lazy-mount WebGL and code-split heavy scenes; render only when in view; cap DPR.
  • Font strategy: next/font, preload display + mono, font-display:swap, avoid layout shift.
  • Respect prefers-reduced-motion and a no-WebGL fallback at every layer.
  • A11y: semantic landmarks, visible focus, real headings, aria on canvas/decorative layers, keyboard nav.
  • Quality gates: Lighthouse ≥ 90 perf on desktop, CLS ≈ 0, 60fps scroll, sub-2.5s LCP.
// scroll → everything (one signal)
lenis.on('scroll', ScrollTrigger.update)
gsap.ticker.add((t) => lenis.raf(t * 1000))
// scene reads global scrollProgress in its render loop
17

Motion & Visual References

مراجع للإلهام والـ benchmark — لكل واحد "إيه اللي ناخده منه" بالظبط.

ReferenceSteal this
Apple (product pages)Scroll-pinned product reveals, restraint, type discipline, polish
Google Creative Lab / Arts & CulturePlayful-yet-precise motion systems, experimental WebGL
BMW interactive campaignsCinematic minimalism, spatial environments, dramatic light
Active TheoryImmersive WebGL worlds, bold transitions, sound design
Lusion / ResnShader craft, particle systems, tactile 3D interaction
Locomotive / Obys AgencySmooth scroll choreography, editorial type, kinetic layouts
Cuberto / Unseen StudioCursor & micro-interaction craft, magnetic UI
Awwwards SOTDCurrent bar for "experiential" portfolio presentation
CinematicSpatialShader-drivenEditorialKinetic typeSound-reactiveRestrained
18

Build Roadmap

خطة تنفيذ على مراحل — من الأساس للـ polish. كل مرحلة قابلة للشحن لوحدها.

PhaseScopeOutput
P0 — FoundationNext.js + tokens + Lenis + layout shell + fontsStatic, smooth-scrolling skeleton
P1 — Motion layerGSAP reveals, kinetic type, cursor, magnetic, loaderThe "feel" is in place
P2 — WebGL heroR3F core + particles + shader gradient + scroll uniformsThe signature scene
P3 — Content systemsProject stories, AI lab, system map, philosophyFull narrative
P4 — TransitionsShared-element case studies + route swaps + post FXCinematic continuity
P5 — Polish & perfMobile pass, a11y, reduced-motion, Lighthouse, soundShip-ready installation

Calm. Intelligent. Alive.

This is the blueprint. The companion mostafa-amir-portfolio.html is a working, cinematic proof of Concept A — open it to feel the direction in motion.

Next: build P0 → P2 in Next.js
MOSTAFA AMIR — CREATIVE DIRECTION © 2026 SYSTEMS · INTELLIGENCE · DESIGN
